## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Call '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- VeldrixAI version / commit SHA:
- Component affected: (backend/core, backend/auth, backend/connectors, frontend, sdk)
- Python version (if backend/SDK):
- Node version (if frontend):
- OS:

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here. Include relevant log snippets if available.
